arts.ttl: 'Chelsea FA Cup tie is being overshadowed and Tyson Fury link is frustrating'
arts.sum: Morecambe fans will protest over ownership situation during their FA Cup third round tie away to Chelsea on Saturday afternoon with their place in the EFL at risk

arts.ttl: Juventus Target Chelsea’s Disasi as Defensive Reinforcement
arts.sum: Juventus are actively pursuing a central defender as part of their January transfer strategy, with Chelsea's Axel Disasi emerging as a notable target. The club is looking to bolster its defence, particularly given the injuries to key players Bremer and Cabal, which necessitate at least one new signing in that position. The post Juventus Target Chelsea’s Disasi as Defensive Reinforcement appeared first on FootItalia.com.

arts.ttl: Chelsea's clever transfer plan to re-sign Marc Guehi could be scuppered for one reason
arts.sum: With Chelsea manager Enzo Maresca already missing main centre-back pair, Wesley Fofana and Benoit Badiashile, and 18-year-old Josh Acheampong making his Premier League debut on Saturday, the Blues are reportedly hoping to arrange a swap deal involving Trevoh Chalobah - who is currently on loan at Palace. The 24-year-old, who is said to have become a target for the Blues in January owing to their defensive injury crisis, spent 14 years at Stamford Bridge as a youth player, making two senior appearances before his stand-out loan stint with Swansea City in the Championship.

arts.ttl: Enzo Maresca reveals why Ben Chilwell will NOT be involved in Chelsea's FA Cup tie against Morecambe
arts.sum: Maresca will not include the England defender, whom the 44-year-old confirmed is free to depart having played just 45 minutes this campaign.

arts.ttl: Chelsea are one of four Premier League clubs keen on signing £15m teenage centre-forward - Sky journalist
arts.sum: Without a doubt, the Chelsea striker position is the one area that supporters debate over more than anything else. The Chelsea squad looks more stable...

arts.ttl: Transfer news and rumours today: Frank Lampard to raid Chelsea, Bournemouth to sign new striker
arts.sum: Sports Mole rounds up the latest transfer news and rumours, including Frank Lampard's possible raid of Chelsea and Bournemouth's desperate search for a new striker.

arts.ttl: Chelsea Transfer News Today: Kvaratskhelia HOPE, Chilwell UPDATE, Duran COMPETITION
arts.sum: FootballTransfers runs through all the latest Chelsea transfer news, rumours and gossip, including updates on Khvicha Kvaratskhelia, Ben Chilwell and Jhon Duran. New West Ham United manager Graham Potter is seeking a reunion with Chelsea outcast Ben Chilwell as his first signing at the London Stadium, FootballTransfers can confirm .

arts.ttl: Chelsea learn how much they need to pay to sign Jhon Duran in January, it looks a no-brainer – opinion
arts.sum: Some at Chelsea are likely kicking themselves that they did not complete one signing they were strongly linked with during the summer transfer window. Jhon...

arts.ttl: Chelsea transfer news: 21-year-old bid 'rejected' after £11.7m Enzo Maresca decision
arts.sum: Chelsea reportedly reject Wolverhampton Wanderers' first bid to sign the versatile Renato Veiga during the January transfer window.

arts.ttl: First Chelsea transfer exit confirmed with more to follow after 'secret' Enzo Maresca deal
arts.sum: Chelsea youngster Alex Matos has completed a loan to League One side Oxford United until the end of the season. Matos, 20, joined Chelsea on a free in 2023 and arrived as a hugely exciting player but has struggled to make a breakthrough into the first team.
